case_title: 2399 FOLSOM STREET, LLC VS. MADERA CUSTOM WINDOWS AND DOORS, LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED SEP-18-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MADERA CUSTOM WINDOWS AND DOORS, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY 2399 FOLSOM STREET, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MADERA CUSTOM WINDOWS AND DOORS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CURING OF UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-21-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF 2399 FOLSOM STREET, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KEN WEI (MANAGER). DEFENDANT MADERA CUSTOM WINDOWS AND DOORS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF HAS AN UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 11/21/23 AT 3:30 P.M. FOR CURING OF UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE AN ORIGINAL PROOF OF SERVICE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-23-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF 2399 FOLSOM STREET, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KEN WEI (MANAGER). DEFENDANT MADERA CUSTOM WINDOWS AND DOORS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S FILED PROOF OF SERVICE TO BE DEFECTIVE AS IT DOES NOT DEMONSTRATE SERVICE ON THE LLC'S AGENT FOR SERVICE OR AN OFFICER OF THE LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KEN WEI (MANAGER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2399 FOLSOM STREET, LLC
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR CURING OF UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF 2399 FOLSOM STREET, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MADERA CUSTOM WINDOWS AND DOORS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
